title: Bridge Essay: The psychedelic renaissance: the next trip for psychiatry?

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**The psychedelic renaissance: the next trip for psychiatry?**. Ir J Psychol Med.. PMID: 31543078. DOI: 10.1017/ipm.2019.39. The psychedelic research renaissance is gaining traction. Preliminary clinical studies of the hallucinogenic fungi, psilocybin, with psychological support, have indicated improvements in mood, anxiety and quality of life. Aseminal, open-label study demonstrated marked reductions in depression symptoms in participants with treatment-resistant depression (TRD).
